ddls:
CREATE TABLE "chemical_substances" (
  "substance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each substance */,
  "uuid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each substance (UUID) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the substance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the substance */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category of the substance (e.g., elementary flow, complex compound) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the substance */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of substance (e.g., elementary flow, complex compound) */,
  "molecular_formula" TEXT /* Molecular formula of the substance */,
  "chemical_abstract" TEXT /* Detailed abstract or notes about the chemical substance */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the substance was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the substance was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("substance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chemical_substances_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., elementary flow, complex compound) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category to support hierarchical categories */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elementary_flows" (
  "elementary_flow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each elementary flow */,
  "substance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the substance that is an elementary flow */,
  "environmental_impact" TEXT /* Environmental impact of the elementary flow (e.g., air, soil, water) */,
  "impact_level" TEXT /* Level of environmental impact (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the elementary flow was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the elementary flow was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("elementary_flow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elementary_flows_substance_id FOREIGN KEY ("substance_id") REFERENCES chemical_substances ("substance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "complex_compounds" (
  "complex_compound_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each complex compound */,
  "substance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the substance that is a complex compound */,
  "molecular_formula" TEXT /* Molecular formula of the complex compound */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the complex compound */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the complex compound was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the complex compound was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("complex_compound_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complex_compounds_substance_id FOREIGN KEY ("substance_id") REFERENCES chemical_substances ("substance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "substance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the substance located at this location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_substance_id FOREIGN KEY ("substance_id") REFERENCES chemical_substances ("substance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cas_numbers" (
  "cas_number_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CAS number */,
  "substance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the substance with this CAS number */,
  "cas_number" TEXT /* CAS number of the substance */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the CAS number was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the CAS number was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cas_number_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cas_numbers_substance_id FOREIGN KEY ("substance_id") REFERENCES chemical_substances ("substance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reference_flow_properties" (
  "reference_flow_property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference flow property */,
  "substance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the substance with this reference flow property */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the reference flow property (e.g., mass) */,
  "property_value" REAL /* Value of the reference flow property */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the reference flow property (e.g., grams, liters) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reference flow property was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reference flow property was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_flow_property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reference_flow_properties_substance_id FOREIGN KEY ("substance_id") REFERENCES chemical_substances ("substance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "substance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the substance being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the substance */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the substance was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the substance */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) used to access the substance */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_substance_id FOREIGN KEY ("substance_id") REFERENCES chemical_substances ("substance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories_substances" (
  "category_substance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category-substance relationship */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category related to the substance */,
  "substance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the substance related to the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category-substance relationship was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category-substance relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_substance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_substances_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_substances_substance_id FOREIGN KEY ("substance_id") REFERENCES chemical_substances ("substance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations_substances" (
  "location_substance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location-substance relationship */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location related to the substance */,
  "substance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the substance related to the location */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the substance at the location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location-substance relationship was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location-substance relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_substance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_substances_substance_id FOREIGN KEY ("substance_id") REFERENCES chemical_substances ("substance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_substances_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cas_numbers_substances" (
  "cas_number_substance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CAS number-substance relationship */,
  "cas_number_id" INTEGER /* ID of the CAS number related to the substance */,
  "substance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the substance related to the CAS number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the CAS number-substance relationship was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the CAS number-substance relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cas_number_substance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cas_numbers_substances_cas_number_id FOREIGN KEY ("cas_number_id") REFERENCES cas_numbers ("cas_number_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cas_numbers_substances_substance_id FOREIGN KEY ("substance_id") REFERENCES chemical_substances ("substance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reference_flow_properties_substances" (
  "reference_flow_property_substance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference flow property-substance relationship */,
  "reference_flow_property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reference flow property related to the substance */,
  "substance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the substance related to the reference flow property */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reference flow property-substance relationship was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reference flow property-substance relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_flow_property_substance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reference_flow_properties_substances_reference_flow_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("reference_flow_property_id") REFERENCES reference_flow_properties ("reference_flow_property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reference_flow_properties_substances_substance_id FOREIGN KEY ("substance_id") REFERENCES chemical_substances ("substance_id")
)
